Package neqsim.process.fielddevelopment.integrated

Class WellTestMatcher.MatchResult

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.fielddevelopment.integrated.WellTestMatcher.MatchResult
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
WellTestMatcher
public static class WellTestMatcher.MatchResult extends Object implements Serializable
Result of a well-test match.
Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim

      • Constant Field Values

    • curve

      private final WellDeliverabilityCurve curve

      private final String model

  • Constructor Details

    • MatchResult

      public MatchResult(WellDeliverabilityCurve curve, double reservoirPressure, double deliverabilityParameter, double rmsError, String model)
      Creates a match result.
      Parameters:
      curve - fitted deliverability curve
      reservoirPressure - fitted reservoir (shut-in) pressure in bara
      deliverabilityParameter - fitted PI (Sm3/day/bar) or AOFP (Sm3/day)
      rmsError - root-mean-square rate residual in Sm3/day
      model - model name ("PI" or "Vogel")

  • Method Details

    • getCurve

      public WellDeliverabilityCurve getCurve()
      Returns the fitted deliverability curve.
      Returns:
      deliverability curve

    • getReservoirPressure

      public double getReservoirPressure()
      Returns the fitted reservoir pressure.
      Returns:
      reservoir pressure in bara

    • getDeliverabilityParameter

      public double getDeliverabilityParameter()
      Returns the fitted deliverability parameter (PI or AOFP).
      Returns:
      PI in Sm3/day/bar or AOFP in Sm3/day

    • getRmsError

      public double getRmsError()
      Returns the RMS rate residual of the fit.
      Returns:
      RMS error in Sm3/day

    • getModel

      public String getModel()
      Returns the model name.
      Returns:
      "PI" or "Vogel"
